proposals.title: clearAll registry warning
proposals.spec_text: All 7 body registry TryAdd/TryRemove in SimulationCommands return Result.Error
proposals.actual_behavior: 6/7 return Result.Error. clearAll silently counts TryRemove failures and returns Ok count.
proposals.proposed_spec_change: FR-004a: 6 single-body operations return Result.Error. clearAll bulk operation emits Trace.TraceWarning for registry cleanup failures but returns Ok.
proposals.proposed_code_change: Add Trace.TraceWarning to clearAll TryRemove failure path (SimulationCommands.fs:307-308)
proposals.rationale: Server-side removal succeeds; local registry TryRemove failure is a cache inconsistency, not a command failure. Consistent with FR-004b cache warning pattern.
